galeria.title: Projects brought to life with our fabrics
galeria.texto: Explore each project by clicking on the image to discover the fabric.

BrouchureHarbour: Vibrant colors and natural fibers to take you back to the colonial era. Discover them.
BrouchureBohemianHarbour: New brochure available! Enjoy a dreamlike journey through our new releases.

bohemian.title: NEW COLLECTION BOHEMIAN
bohemian.description: Bohemian is an outdoor fabric collection that combines character and performance, designed to withstand sun, humidity, and intensive use without losing its aesthetic essence. A versatile and sophisticated proposal, ideal for terraces, gardens, and outdoor contract projects.

husky.title: NEW COLLECTION HUSKY
husky.description: Husky is a collection developed to provide maximum safety in demanding environments. Its fabrics are designed not to ignite or spread flames, offering protection and reliability. With 100% opacity and an easy-to-integrate color range, it is ideal for contract projects.

future.title: NEW COLLECTION FUTURE
future.description: Future is a collection designed to adapt precisely to spherical shapes, delivering a uniform and high-quality finish. Its fabrics combine strength, flexibility, and versatility, enabling innovative solutions for contemporary projects.
